title: Hydrate Ridge Summit Hydrophone
text:
Name: Hydrate Ridge Summit Hydrophone
Type: hydrophone
Location: Southern Hydrate Ridge Summit
Source: ooi_api
Description: Broadband hydrophone recording ambient ocean sound, bubble streams from methane seeps, and seismic events
Keywords: hydrophone, acoustic, methane, seep, bubble, sound, hydrate ridge
Latitude: 44.5691
Longitude: -125.1479
Depth: 775 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: "Pa"
Sample rate: 200 Hz
OOI site: RS01SUM2 / node: MJ01B

title: Hydrate Ridge Summit Hydrophone (description)
text: Broadband hydrophone recording ambient ocean sound, bubble streams from methane seeps, and seismic events

title: Hydrate Ridge Summit Seafloor Pressure
text:
Name: Hydrate Ridge Summit Seafloor Pressure
Type: pressure
Location: Southern Hydrate Ridge Summit
Source: ooi_api
Description: High-resolution seafloor absolute pressure for detecting tectonic deformation, slow slip events, and vertical seafloor movement
Keywords: pressure, seafloor, deformation, slow slip, tectonic, subsidence, uplift, hydrate ridge
Latitude: 44.5691
Longitude: -125.1479
Depth: 775 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: "psia"
Sample rate: 10 Hz
OOI site: RS01SUM2 / node: MJ01B

title: Hydrate Ridge Summit Seafloor Pressure (description)
text: High-resolution seafloor absolute pressure for detecting tectonic deformation, slow slip events, and vertical seafloor movement

title: Hydrate Ridge Ocean Bottom Seismometer
text:
Name: Hydrate Ridge Ocean Bottom Seismometer
Type: seismometer
Location: Southern Hydrate Ridge Summit
Source: ooi_api
Description: Broadband 3-component ocean bottom seismometer recording local and teleseismic earthquakes, tremor, and seismic noise
Keywords: seismometer, earthquake, tremor, seismic, broadband, hydrate ridge
Latitude: 44.5691
Longitude: -125.1479
Depth: 775 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: "m/s"
Sample rate: 200 Hz
Channels: BHZ, BHN, BHE
OOI site: RS01SUM2 / node: MJ01B

title: Hydrate Ridge Ocean Bottom Seismometer (description)
text: Broadband 3-component ocean bottom seismometer recording local and teleseismic earthquakes, tremor, and seismic noise

title: ASHES Hydrothermal Field Ocean Bottom Seismometer
text:
Name: ASHES Hydrothermal Field Ocean Bottom Seismometer
Type: seismometer
Location: ASHES Hydrothermal Field, Axial Seamount
Source: ooi_api
Description: Short-period seismometer at the ASHES hydrothermal vent field on Axial Seamount, recording eruption-related seismicity
Keywords: seismometer, earthquake, seismic, axial seamount, hydrothermal, vent, eruption, volcano
Latitude: 45.9337
Longitude: -130.0135
Depth: 1542 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: "m/s"
Sample rate: 100 Hz
OOI site: RS03ASHS / node: MJ03B

title: ASHES Hydrothermal Field Ocean Bottom Seismometer (description)
text: Short-period seismometer at the ASHES hydrothermal vent field on Axial Seamount, recording eruption-related seismicity

title: Axial Base Low-Frequency Hydrophone
text:
Name: Axial Base Low-Frequency Hydrophone
Type: hydrophone
Location: Axial Seamount Base
Source: ooi_api
Description: Low-frequency hydrophone at Axial Seamount base for detecting eruption-related T-wave signals and whale vocalizations
Keywords: hydrophone, acoustic, low frequency, axial seamount, eruption, whale, t-wave
Latitude: 45.8168
Longitude: -129.754
Depth: 2607 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: "Pa"
Sample rate: 200 Hz
OOI site: RS03AXBS / node: LJ03A

title: Axial Base Low-Frequency Hydrophone (description)
text: Low-frequency hydrophone at Axial Seamount base for detecting eruption-related T-wave signals and whale vocalizations

title: Axial Base Seafloor Pressure
text:
Name: Axial Base Seafloor Pressure
Type: pressure
Location: Axial Seamount Base
Source: ooi_api
Description: Seafloor pressure at Axial Seamount base, monitoring caldera inflation/deflation cycle related to magma chamber pressure
Keywords: pressure, seafloor, axial seamount, inflation, deflation, magma, volcano, eruption
Latitude: 45.8168
Longitude: -129.754
Depth: 2607 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: "psia"
Sample rate: 10 Hz
OOI site: RS03AXBS / node: LJ03A

title: Axial Base Seafloor Pressure (description)
text: Seafloor pressure at Axial Seamount base, monitoring caldera inflation/deflation cycle related to magma chamber pressure

title: Axial Seamount Shallow Profiler CTD
text:
Name: Axial Seamount Shallow Profiler CTD
Type: ctd
Location: Axial Seamount Profiler
Source: ooi_api
Description: CTD profiler on wire-following profiler mooring at Axial Seamount, measuring temperature, salinity, pressure through the water column
Keywords: ctd, temperature, salinity, pressure, profiler, water column, axial seamount
Latitude: 45.9316
Longitude: -129.9808
Depth: 200 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: {"temperature":"°C","salinity":"PSU","pressure":"dbar"}
OOI site: RS03AXPS / node: PC03A

title: Axial Seamount Shallow Profiler CTD (description)
text: CTD profiler on wire-following profiler mooring at Axial Seamount, measuring temperature, salinity, pressure through the water column

title: Hydrate Ridge pCO2 Sensor
text:
Name: Hydrate Ridge pCO2 Sensor
Type: pco2
Location: Southern Hydrate Ridge Flank
Source: ooi_api
Description: Seafloor pCO2 sensor at Hydrate Ridge measuring dissolved CO2 concentration, a proxy for methane oxidation and carbonate chemistry
Keywords: pco2, co2, carbon, methane oxidation, carbonate, chemistry, seep, hydrate ridge
Latitude: 44.5664
Longitude: -125.1467
Depth: 780 m
Data available from: 2015-07-01
Units: "ppm"
OOI site: RS01SUM1 / node: LJ01B

title: Hydrate Ridge pCO2 Sensor (description)
text: Seafloor pCO2 sensor at Hydrate Ridge measuring dissolved CO2 concentration, a proxy for methane oxidation and carbonate chemistry

title: Hydrate Ridge Diffuse Fluid Flow
text:
Name: Hydrate Ridge Diffuse Fluid Flow
Type: thermistor
Location: Southern Hydrate Ridge Summit
Source: ooi_api
Description: Hydrothermal fluid temperature and pH at Hydrate Ridge seep, measuring diffuse flow chemistry from methane-rich fluids
Keywords: temperature, ph, hydrothermal, diffuse flow, methane, seep, hydrate ridge, fluid
Latitude: 44.5691
Longitude: -125.1479
Depth: 775 m
Data available from: 2015-04-01
Units: {"temperature":"°C","pH":"pH units"}
OOI site: RS01SUM2 / node: MJ01B

title: Hydrate Ridge Diffuse Fluid Flow (description)
text: Hydrothermal fluid temperature and pH at Hydrate Ridge seep, measuring diffuse flow chemistry from methane-rich fluids

title: ASHES Hydrothermal Vent Fluid Chemistry

title: Hydrate Ridge Scanning Sonar (DIDSON/OVRSRA)
text:
Name: Hydrate Ridge Scanning Sonar (DIDSON/OVRSRA)
Type: sonar
Location: Southern Hydrate Ridge Summit
Source: pi_html
Description: High-frequency scanning sonar (DIDSON) imaging methane bubble plumes rising from hydrate ridge seafloor. Data stored on PI web server.
Keywords: sonar, didson, bubble, plume, methane, seep, acoustic, imaging, hydrate ridge
Latitude: 44.5691
Longitude: -125.1479
Depth: 775 m
Data available from: 2015-06-01
PI data URL: http://piweb.ooirsn.uw.edu/marum/data/OVRSRA101/

title: Hydrate Ridge Scanning Sonar (DIDSON/OVRSRA) (description)
text: High-frequency scanning sonar (DIDSON) imaging methane bubble plumes rising from hydrate ridge seafloor. Data stored on PI web server.

title: ASHES Seafloor Mass Spectrometer (MASSP)

Longitude: -130.0135
Depth: 1542 m
